name: Rowell Reunion T-Shirt (Adult)
description: Classic crew-neck tee featuring the 2026 Rowell Family Reunion logo. Available in sizes S–3XL.

name: Rowell Reunion T-Shirt (Kids)
description: Youth-sized crew-neck tee with the reunion logo. Available in sizes YS–YXL.

name: Reunion Coffee Mug
description: 11 oz ceramic mug with the Rowell Family Reunion crest on both sides.

name: Insulated Travel Tumbler
description: 20 oz stainless steel tumbler with reunion branding. Keeps drinks hot or cold for hours.

name: Family Keepsake Book
description: Hardcover book documenting Rowell family history, photos, and stories across generations.

name: Reunion Memory Journal
description: Guided journal with prompts for recording reunion memories, family recipes, and messages from relatives.
